title: webpack-dev-server@1.15.0 breaks build 🚨
body:
Hello lovely humans, [webpack-dev-server](https://www.npmjs.com/package/webpack-dev-server) just published its new version 1.15.0.
State Failing tests :rotating_light:
Dependency webpack-dev-server
New version 1.15.0
Type devDependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build went from success to failure**. As webpack-dev-server is “only” a devDependency of this project it **might not break production or downstream projects**, but “only” your build or test tools – **preventing new deploys or publishes**. I recommend you give this issue a high priority. I’m sure you can resolve this :muscle: Of course this could just be a false positive, caused by a flaky test suite, or third parties that are currently broken or unavailable, but that would be another problem I’d recommend working on. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 39 commits . - [`f1ce64f`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/f1ce64f848bf5165b457fbdfff4cc5432b1f313a) 1.15.0 - [`cdbda1d`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/cdbda1d38b7c803ac856fd4e36f2d83a2da004b9) Add changelog - [`838b58a`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/838b58af0b22303693d11becbaa807f7a771c702) Enable linting for some forgotten files - [`9973128`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/99731281ce06dac367a61334e265e15bf1fbf9d6) pass this to setup. Fixes #536 - [`38624be`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/38624beec4e4aefd5c1b1ece799c9fa38554694c) Assigned --cacert CLI argument to correct options property - [`31b0a1a`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/31b0a1a9cb00b33d4050ea764a40e538a547a23b) set headers on all requests to support e.g. CORS - [`4713e97`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/4713e970ec76a3bd3bbb96e41015099b20af7c41) update dependencies - [`47c1699`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/47c169972f5dbbeac172018447292640888ef461) merged #443 - [`8da1e57`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/8da1e57ca0a552076b8ad87fb7135379d95b91a6) FIX console.log spacing - [`daa1baf`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/daa1baf340ec94baa727c2d24e50462d3294b9e6) Don't reload app upon proxy errors. - [`31f6ac1`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/31f6ac125df89a2de83a2f6f576b70fc37b2e41b) Allow running dev-server behind https proxy - [`f28944e`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/f28944e1dc84a832215cda3fcd87178a068c8b99) Update self signed ssl certificates - [`3767f41`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/3767f4149bce129f2d39dd4e3842eaf7838d6388) Allow to use port from current page, the same way we allow to use hostname. - [`0f013aa`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/0f013aa74e969385c58d0a90fcae01eda54d2c7e) correct proxy options - [`1c04206`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/1c0420636a1a6580f146476f1c76eda27f4c512a) add `staticOptions` for expose express.static options pass in There are 39 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/compare/eae3a0c73fb847521b42ac2accae1c0906dd6023...f1ce64f848bf5165b457fbdfff4cc5432b1f313a). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
